---
metadata-files:
  - _variables.yml
pagetitle: "Clase {{< meta clase_nro >}}"
title: "Robótica"
subtitle: "Clase {{< meta clase_nro >}}"
date: today
date-format: "[Semana {{< meta semana >}} - {{< meta fecha >}}]"
institute: "FICH - UNL"
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: default
        footer: <a href="/">Robótica 2026 - Tecnicatura Universitaria en Automatización y Robótica </a>
        menu: false
        slide-number: c
        history: false
        code-overflow: wrap
        code-copy: false
        fig-format: svg
        include-in-header:
            text: |
                <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
                <style>.mjx-chtml{ font-size: 100% !important; }</style>
filters:
    - diagram
diagram:
    engine:
        tikz:
            execpath: pdflatex
            header-includes:
                - '\usepackage{cancel}'
                - '\usepackage{amsmath}'
                - '\usetikzlibrary{arrows.meta, shapes, intersections, decorations.markings,bending}'
                - '\usepackage{adjustbox}'
jupyter: python3
output-file: index.html
---

# Cinemática {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include slides/_cinematica.qmd >}}




# Robot diferencial {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include slides/_diff-drive.qmd >}}




# Modelo cinemático {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include slides/_mod-cinematico.qmd >}}




# Taller de resolución {visibility="hidden"}

## [Taller de resolución](tres.qmd) {.center}

Ejercicios 5 al 8
